summary: Multi-Mode Selling Price System - Comprehensive Testing Complete. Backend: 15/15 tests PASSED (100%). Frontend: PricingConfigModal working, MODE HARGA column visible, DollarSign button functional. Fixed MasterItems.jsx token access error.

BACKEND_TESTS.pricing_init: PASS - API /api/pricing/init initialized system with 4 modes and 5 customer levels
BACKEND_TESTS.pricing_modes: PASS - GET /api/pricing/modes returns 4 modes (single, quantity, level, unit)
BACKEND_TESTS.customer_levels: PASS - GET /api/pricing/customer-levels returns 5 levels (retail, member, reseller, distributor, grosir)
BACKEND_TESTS.quantity_pricing_config: PASS - GET /api/pricing/product/{id} returns quantity mode config
BACKEND_TESTS.level_pricing_config: PASS - GET /api/pricing/product/{id} returns level mode config
BACKEND_TESTS.level_member: PASS - member level price calculated correctly
BACKEND_TESTS.pos_security_kasir_403: PASS - KASIR blocked from changing prices (403 or price selection disabled)
BACKEND_TESTS.pos_security_pemilik_allowed: PASS - PEMILIK with inherit_all can change prices

FRONTEND_TESTS.master_items_page: PASS - Page loads correctly with items table
FRONTEND_TESTS.mode_harga_column: PASS - MODE HARGA column displays QTY/LEVEL/SINGLE badges
FRONTEND_TESTS.dollarsign_button: PASS - DollarSign button visible in AKSI column
FRONTEND_TESTS.pricing_config_modal: PASS - Modal opens with 4 pricing mode options
FRONTEND_TESTS.quantity_rules_display: PASS - Quantity pricing rules table shows correctly
FRONTEND_TESTS.security_notice: PASS - Security warning about override_price permission displayed

FIX_APPLIED.issue: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'headers')
FIX_APPLIED.root_cause: api.defaults.headers.Authorization was used but api is a function, not axios instance
FIX_APPLIED.fix: Changed to use token directly from useAuth() hook

seed_data_creation: Test products with pricing configs already exist: 397edcd5-d0ab-4982-ba6b-79889ff3d798 (quantity mode), 339a4adf-1f19-459a-8dfc-a27dc7fd00a0 (level mode)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-Mode Pricing System fully functional. 4 modes: Single, Quantity (tier-based), Level (customer type), Unit (PCS/PACK/DUS). POS Security enforced via override_price permission. PricingConfigModal accessible via DollarSign button in Master Items. Fixed token access in MasterItems.jsx. All APIs working at /api/pricing/* endpoints.
